entry.name: commandPath
entry.label: Path to the codexbar command.

entry.name: provider
entry.label: Optional provider id passed to codexbar.

entry.name: source
entry.label: Optional CodexBar provider source override.

entry.name: refreshInterval
entry.label: Refresh interval in seconds.

entry.name: includeStatus
entry.label: Fetch provider status pages.

entry.name: costUsageEnabled
entry.label: Show local cost usage.

entry.name: costHistoryDays
entry.label: Cost history window in days.

entry.name: usageBarsShowUsed
entry.label: Show usage bars as percent used instead of percent left.

entry.name: showQuotaWarningMarkers
entry.label: Show quota warning markers on usage bars.

entry.name: enableNotifications
entry.label: Enable Plasma notifications.

entry.name: notifyStatusIncidents
entry.label: Notify when provider status incidents appear or change.

entry.name: notifyQuotaWarnings
entry.label: Notify when usage crosses quota warning thresholds.

entry.name: notifyLimitResets
entry.label: Notify when a heavily used limit resets back to empty.

entry.name: updateChecksEnabled
entry.label: Check for widget updates.

entry.name: updateNotificationsEnabled
entry.label: Notify when widget updates are available.

entry.name: autoUpdateEnabled
entry.label: Install widget updates automatically.

entry.name: autoUpdateIntervalHours
entry.label: Widget update check interval in hours.

entry.name: autoUpdateLastCheck
entry.label: Last widget update check timestamp.

entry.name: widgetUpdateLastStatus
entry.label: Last widget update status.

entry.name: widgetUpdateLastError
entry.label: Last widget update error.

entry.name: menuBarDisplayMode
entry.label: Menu bar text display mode.

entry.name: resetTimesShowAbsolute
entry.label: Show reset times as absolute local times.

entry.name: showProviderChangelogs
entry.label: Show provider changelog links.

entry.name: showProviderInPanel
entry.label: Show the provider name in the panel.

entry.name: showPercentInPanel
entry.label: Show the primary usage percentage in the panel.

entry.name: showMultiProviderInPanel
entry.label: Show multi-provider details in the panel.

entry.name: autoSelectProvider
entry.label: Auto-select the highest-usage provider.

entry.name: overviewProviderIDs
entry.label: Comma-separated provider ids shown in the Overview tab.

entry.name: showCreditsInPanel
entry.label: Show credits in the panel when available.

entry.name: providerConfigRevision
entry.label: Internal revision bumped when provider enablement changes.
